notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Valenzuela singles on a line drive to right fielder Adolis García. Ernie Clement scores. Kazuma Okamoto to 3rd. Throwing error by right fielder Adolis García.

notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. George Springer out at 2nd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 1st.
